sql:
SELECT  id, 
        title, img, description 
FROM    nav_item

SELECT  id, 
        title, img, description 
FROM    nav_item

SELECT  TO_CHAR(nav_item_id) || '-' || TO_CHAR(id) AS id, 
        title, href, description 
FROM    nav_sub_item
WHERE   title LIKE '%' || '' || '%'
ORDER BY nav_item_id, id

SELECT  TO_CHAR(nav_item_id) || '-' || TO_CHAR(id) AS id, 
        title, href, description 
FROM    nav_sub_item
WHERE   title LIKE '%' || '' || '%'
ORDER BY nav_item_id, id
